mapper.sql: member_no AS memberNo, member_id AS memberId, password, name, gender, birth, email, hp, role, grade, point, status, zip, addr1, addr2, last_login_date AS lastLoginDate, leave_date AS leaveDate, reg_date AS regDate

choose.otherwise: member_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR hp LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

mapper.select: SELECT FROM member ORDER BY member_no DESC
SELECT FROM member ORDER BY member_no DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT FROM member
ORDER BY member_no DESC

SELECT FROM member
ORDER BY member_no DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member(member_id, password, name, gender, birth, email, hp, role, grade, point, status, zip, addr1, addr2, reg_date) VALUES(#{memberId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{birth}, #{email}, #{hp}, COALESCE(#{role}, 'USER'), COALESCE(#{grade}, 'FAMILY'), COALESCE(#{point}, 0), COALESCE(#{status}, 'ACTIVE'), #{zip}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, NOW())
